raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "31% of guns recovered in California were unserialized, untraceable ghost guns.",
    "In Los Angeles, 41% of recovered guns were untraceable ghost guns.",
    "More than 2,500 ghost guns were connected to criminal activity in 114 Federal cases from 2010 through April 2020.",
    "The presence of firearms in a situation of domestic violence significantly increases the risk of homicide.",
    "Ghost guns quickly became the fastest growing issue in gun safety in California.",
    "Gun Violence Restraining Orders (GVROs) have enjoyed broad bipartisan support in California.",
    "Using GVROs can prevent dangerous individuals from having access to firearms.",
    "Ghost-gun parts should be included as seizable items under gun violence restraining orders."
  ]
}
```
